reference: Hello, nowadays we have good medications for asthma. You should get a lung function test done and treatment accordingly. You can be completely symptom-free with effective medications. Consider getting an allergy test to identify the triggers and immunotherapy, which can help cure allergies.
text: Hello. Nowadays, we have good medications for asthma. You should get a lung function test done and treatment accordingly. You can be completely symptom-free with effective medications. Consider getting an allergy test to identify the triggers and immunotherapy, which can help cure allergies.
